item.title: CYBER RISK IN FINANCIAL TERMS: WHY Open FAIR™ IS THE GOLD STANDARD
item.description: Discover the missing piece of your risk management framework: Risk quantification with Open FAIR™.

item.title: How Does Black Kite Calculate Cybersecurity Ratings?
item.description: What if we told you that Black Kite’s process of calculating cybersecurity ratings is a lot like sorting a giant bowl of M&M’s?

item.title: Should I Talk to My Vendors About Their Cyber Posture?
item.description: There are several factors to consider when determining the best course of action when your vendor’s cyber posture changes.

item.title: The Challenge of Securing a Constantly Shifting Tech Ecosystem
item.description: To educate readers about the status quo of constantly shifting tech ecosystems, challenges in securing them, and how to overcome them.

item.title: A Quick Guide to Cybersecurity Continuous Monitoring Resources
item.description: All the blogs, videos, and guides you need to learn about, assess, and implement continuous risk monitoring.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: CRITICAL THIRD-PARTY RISK INSIGHTS – MSSQL AND ADOBE FLASH PLAYER VULNERABILITIES
item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we continue to explore high-profile cybersecurity incidents through the lens of Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: INSIGHTS INTO THIRD-PARTY RISKS IN FORTINET CORE PRODUCTS, CISCO RV ROUTERS, AND IVANTI CONNECT SECURE VULNERABILITIES
item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we delve into high-profile cybersecurity incidents with a critical eye on Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: Why Vendor Collaboration is Critical in TPRM and How to Do It Right
item.description: Discover the keys to effective vendor collaboration, avoid common pitfalls, and strengthen security posture through clear, actionable communication.

item.title: BLACK KITE RESEARCH REVEALS THAT 80% OF MANUFACTURING COMPANIES HAVE CRITICAL VULNERABILITIES
item.description: Black Kite research finds 80 % of manufacturing companies have critical vulnerabilities — learn risk trends and mitigation strategies.

item.title: Understanding OSFI B-10 and B-13 For Financial Institutions
item.description: Learn how OSFI B-10 and B-13 improve cybersecurity and third-party risk management for Canadian financial institutions.

item.title: BLACK KITE ANNOUNCES COURT DISMISSAL OF BITSIGHT TECHNOLOGIES’ PATENT CLAIMS IN FEDERAL COURT LITIGATION
item.description: Black Kite wins court dismissal of BitSight’s federal patent claims, reinforcing its innovation and legal resilience in cybersecurity.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: TPRM INSIGHTS INTO PGADMIN, KEYCLOAK, AND NAVIDROME VULNERABILITIES
item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog, we continue to explore high-profile cybersecurity incidents through the lens of Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: Your Guide to Developing an AI-Driven TPRM program
item.description: Learn the steps to develop an AI-driven Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) program, from feasibility to execution, with practical tips and insights.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: THIRD-PARTY RISK INSIGHTS ON ZIMBRA, DrayTek ROUTERS, AUTHENTIK, AND OCTOPUS DEPLOY VULNERABILITIES
item.description: Welcome to Focus Friday blog, where we delve into high-profile cybersecurity incidents with a critical eye on Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: Communicating Risk Intelligence to Stakeholders for Collaborative Remediation
item.description: Communicating risk intelligence is a necessary part of risk management. Learn how to tailor these conversations to stakeholders’ unique concerns.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: TPRM CHALLENGES IN THE FACE OF IVANTI ICS, CACTI, SONICWALL, CONFLUENCE, AND CITRIX VULNERABILITIES
item.description: Focus Friday: Learn more about recent the cyber breaches and critical vulnerabilities from Black Kite.

item.title: Focus Friday: Lessons from the CrowdStrike Update Outage on Global IT Resilience
item.description: Learn more about the CrowdStrike update outage from a Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) perspective and immediate steps to protect your supply chain.

item.title: CrowdStrike Outage: Lessons on Fragility and Resilience
item.description: Lessons learned from the CrowdStrike outage, its shocking impact on society, and the crucial reminder of the third-party risk problem.

item.title: Black Kite’s Data and Intelligence Sets a New Standard in Forrester Wave™ Cybersecurity Risk Ratings
item.description: Need better data and intelligence to run your third-party risk management program? See how Black Kite sets the bar higher.

item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we delve into high-profile cybersecurity incidents with a critical eye on Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.description: Introducing Black Kite Bridge — an industry-first platform enabling real-time risk collaboration across vendor ecosystems.

item.title: Black Kite Achieves SOC 2 – Type 2 Compliance
item.description: Black Kite attains SOC 2 Type 2 compliance, underscoring its commitment to data security, operational integrity, and third-party risk trust.

item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we continue to explore high-profile cybersecurity incidents through the lens of Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we delve into high-profile cybersecurity incidents with a critical eye on Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: Our RiskBusters Bust the TPRM Myth that You Can’t See Nth-Party Risks
item.description: Our RiskBusters debunk the myth that TPRM cannot see beyond third parties and explain the importance of Nth-party risk visibility. Learn more today.

item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we delve into high-profile cybersecurity incidents with a critical eye on Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: Don’t Wait for Ransomware: RiskBusters Shows How to See It Coming
item.description: Are ransomware attacks completely random, or is there a way to predict where they will strike next? RiskBusters™ has the answer.

item.title: Three New Solutions from Black Kite Automate Compliance of Third-Party Cyber Assessments with Industry’s First Cyber-Aware AI Engine
item.description: Discover Black Kite’s three new solutions that automate third-party cyber assessments with the industry’s first Cyber-Aware AI engine.
